prompt:
A compost bucket after the hot phase, shown open with a calm, earthy-looking mix inside—darker, stable, and slightly fluffy rather than steaming. A simple compost thermometer probe rests nearby on the bench, and the bucket exterior shows ventilation holes and a tidy lid, conveying that it has cooled and is ready to be screened.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk backyard/workshop setting: soft cinematic lighting, realistic organic texture without grossness, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the cooled compost bucket centered and clearly “finished curing.”
